top_signals.title: Korean Firms Turn to Short-Term Funding as Bond Yields Climb
top_signals.summary: South Korean firms have increasingly turned to short-term financing as rising government bond yields drive up borrowing costs in the corporate debt market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Activist fund Elliott calls for sale of Australia’s largest gold miner
top_signals.summary: US firm builds up stake in Northern Star Resources
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Europe’s Junk Firms Look to Cut Loan Costs in Hot Market
top_signals.summary: Borrowers are rushing to Europe’s leveraged loan market at the start of the week to reprice debt, as they seek to capitalize on favorable credit conditions to cut their funding costs.

top_signals.title: Spain arrests doxer leaking sensitive data of govt employees
top_signals.summary: The Spanish National Police has arrested an individual for leaking sensitive information related to members of various key state organizations, including the National Cybersecurity Institute (INCIBE). [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
